name: Full portfolio review — health + life + motor
description: User wants comprehensive review of their insurance portfolio

input.message: I am 40 years old, married, 2 kids aged 10 and 7. Income ₹25 lakhs. I have: 1) Star Health family floater ₹5L for family of 4. 2) LIC endowment ₹10L sum assured, ₹45,000 annual premium, 8 years old. 3) Maruti car comprehensive. Is my coverage adequate?

notes: Should identify: 1) Health underinsured — ₹5L for family of 4 in metro insufficient (₹15-25L recommended). 2) LIC endowment IRR ~4-5% — may not be optimal. 3) No term insurance — significant gap (should have ₹2-3.75 crore term plan). 4) Motor OK. Multiple agents should run: PolicyAnalyzer + PortfolioOptimizer + RiskDetector.
